nodes.label: Contact Obfuscation Mechanism
nodes.author: Amol Kumar Thakre
nodes.rationale: Protects contact information (email and phone) from automated scrapers using JavaScript-based obfuscation while maintaining mobile usability (e.g. setting mailto immediately on touch start / focus / click).

nodes.label: Concept-to-Competition Pipeline
nodes.author: Amol Kumar Thakre
nodes.rationale: Applies industrial R&D logic to exam preparation by focusing on visual concept intuition first, followed by rigorous problem sets, weekly tests, and detailed error tracking to ensure high performance in competitive exams.

nodes.label: Digital Twin Method
nodes.author: Amol Kumar Thakre
nodes.rationale: Replaces rote learning with mental simulations, enabling students to visualize physical and chemical systems through analytical and computational frameworks.

nodes.label: Vedic Speed and Agility
nodes.author: Amol Kumar Thakre
nodes.rationale: Uses the 16 Sutras of Vedic Mathematics to optimize mental calculation speed and efficiency, giving students a time-saving edge in competitive exams.

nodes.label: Industrial R&D Logic Flow
nodes.author: Amol Kumar Thakre
nodes.rationale: Leverages problem-solving and decision-making frameworks from companies like GE and Equinor (e.g. multi-well systems, subsea separation, multiphase flows) to teach physics and chemistry.

nodes.label: High-Fidelity Performance Analytics
nodes.author: Amol Kumar Thakre
nodes.rationale: Utilizes chapter-wise statistics and error logging to map student performance, targeting conceptual gaps dynamically before they lead to errors.

nodes.label: Scholar's Study Palette
nodes.rationale: Deep navy for authority/ink, prestige gold as a precious accent rule/garnish, warm cream paper for approachable Scholarly look rather than clinical white.

nodes.label: Scholarly Typography
nodes.rationale: Spectral (serif) for display & headings to give scholarly, editorial gravitas. Hanken Grotesk (sans) for body & UI for clean, friendly legibility.

nodes.label: No Marketing Fluff Policy
nodes.rationale: Avoid student names, testimonials, ranks, or fee figures to focus purely on academic credentials and methodology-first trust.
